//: JD AI System Optimizer — example Claude Code settings.json
//1: Copy the parts you want into ~/.claude/settings.json (global) or
//2: .claude/settings.json (per project). Adjust paths to your machine.

statusLine.//: Live session cost in your status bar. See statusline/ in this repo.

permissions.//allow: Pre-approve safe, read-only operations so you stop clicking 'allow' all day. These never modify anything.
permissions.//deny: Hard-block destructive or outward-facing commands so they ALWAYS require explicit confirmation, even if something tries to auto-run them.
